scope.notes: Prepared only high-confidence duplicate project records. Excluded entity, corridor, route, and treatment_component records.

record_existence_and_kind.command: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "with selected(record_id) as (...) select count(*) as selected_records, sum(case when r.record_kind='project' then 1 else 0 end) as project_records from selected s left join records r using(record_id); select r.record_id, r.record_kind from records r where r.record_id in (...) order by r.record_id;"
record_existence_and_kind.result: selected_records=11, project_records=11; every selected alias and target returned record_kind=project.

existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_command: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select * from identity_aliases where kind='project' and alias in (selected_alias_ids);"

do_not_merge_conflicts.db_command: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "with pairs(alias,target) as (...) select d.* from do_not_merge d join pairs p on d.kind='project' and ((d.record_id_a=p.alias and d.record_id_b=p.target) or (d.record_id_a=p.target and d.record_id_b=p.alias));"
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_command: jq -r --argjson pairs '[selected_pairs]' '.pairs.project[]? as $d | $d.record_ids as $ids | select(any($pairs[]; ...))' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json

prior_prep_conflicts.command: jq -r '.proposed_aliases[]? | select(.kind=="project" and (.alias_id as $id | [selected_alias_ids] | index($id))) | input_filename + ":" + .alias_id' data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch0[4-9][0-9]-prep.json
prior_prep_conflicts.result: no rows; no selected alias_id appeared in prior codex identity prep artifacts through identity096.

guard_summary.source_evidence_command: sqlite3 -header -csv data/canonical.db "select e.record_id, e.source_id, e.block_id, e.page_number, replace(substr(b.raw_text,1,180), char(10), ' ') as quote from evidence_refs e left join blocks_fts b on b.source_id=e.source_id and b.block_id=e.block_id where e.record_id in (...) and e.ordinal=0 order by e.record_id;"

forbidden_command_compliance.evidence: No provider-backed or forbidden project commands were run. Inspection used local deterministic commands only: pwd, rg, git status, ls, sed, head, jq, sqlite3, date, test, shell loops, and apply_patch for this artifact.
